key_insights.insight: The Mafia's code of conduct prioritizes loyalty to the organization above all else, including family.
key_insights.quote: From now on, 24 hours a day, seven days a week, you're on call to serve this family, the Colombo family. That means if your mother is sick and she's dying, you're at her bedside, we call you to service, you leave your mother, you come and serve us.

key_insights.insight: In the Mafia, discipline and respect for authority are paramount; even minor infractions can have severe consequences.
key_insights.quote: You had a meeting at 8 o'clock, you weren't there at 7.30, you were late. Can never be late in that life.

key_insights.insight: There's a distinction between 'gangsters' and 'racketeers' within organized crime, with the latter using the life to benefit him in business
key_insights.quote: A gangster is a guy that really doesn't know how to use that life to benefit him in business... We were racketeers.

key_insights.insight: Preparation is key in negotiation, involving understanding the other party's personality and having a fallback position.
key_insights.quote: Before I walk into a meeting with somebody, number one, try to know the personality of that person. Know if there's a fallback position, if I'm not winning, what I'll accept.

key_insights.insight: Even if you are completely correct in a negotiation, without the right skill, you can still lose.
key_insights.quote: Believe me, you could be 100% right and end up wrong, and they'll put you in a trap.

key_insights.insight: Within organized crime, the concept of rules and consequences are strongly reinforced; violation of rules is met with predetermined punishment.
key_insights.quote: If one of us decides to violate the policy of the law and we get caught, well, we understand the consequences.

actionable_advice.advice: Thoroughly prepare for any negotiation by researching the other party.
actionable_advice.how_to: Before meeting, research the person's background, communication style, and potential motivations. Try to understand their personality and any potential weaknesses.

actionable_advice.advice: Always arrive early for meetings and appointments, and eliminate any potential for distractions.
actionable_advice.how_to: Plan ahead for potential delays such as traffic, and arrive at the location well in advance to ensure punctuality and respect for other people's time.

actionable_advice.advice: In any negotiation, always have a defined fallback position.
actionable_advice.how_to: Determine the minimum acceptable outcome before starting discussions, ensuring you don't end up agreeing to unfavorable terms under pressure.

memorable_stories: The initiation process into the Colombo family involved a two-and-a-half year 'pledge period' requiring absolute obedience.
The anecdote about getting a 'tongue lashing' for being late to a meeting, and being 'put on the shelf' highlights the emphasis on discipline.
contrarian_claims: The oath of Omertà is not necessarily an oath to lie, steal, cheat, and kill
The guest implies that the government shouldn't violate the law to uphold the law, even against criminals, challenging the idea that the ends justify the means.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Moment 202: Former Mafia Boss EXPOSES How The Real MAFIA KILLS People...
